_format.description: Standard format for n8n workflow payload schemas stored in n8n_workflows.payload_schema

fields.name: field_name
fields.description: human-readable description of what this field is
fields.default: optional — only present when required is false

fields.name: title
fields.description: event title shown in Google Calendar

fields.name: dateTime
fields.description: absolute ISO 8601 start time in WIB (UTC+7) e.g. 2026-04-14T10:00:00+07:00 — never pass relative strings like 'tomorrow'
